title: CloseContext
text: CloseContext Controls whether the Close caption button works only within the context of the form component of which it is part. CloseContext = on | off Arguments on —the Close caption button of an inactive form component, such as a parent form of a modal form, is disabled and cannot be used to close either the parent form or the child form. The active modal child form can be closed only by its own Close caption button. off —pressing the Close caption button of any form causes the form that has focus to be closed. Default value on File section [upi] Description In tab pages, the form components that implement the tab pages do not have Close caption buttons. Only the parent, the form component that contains the tab widget, has a Close caption button. If CloseContext is set to on , the Close caption button always invokes a quit request on the parent form, irrespective of whether the tab or the parent form has focus. If CloseContext is set to off , clicking the Close caption button invokes a quit request on the form that has focus. Related Links utab (Tab) The utab widget enables users to navigate through a collection of contained forms by clicking a tab to display the form. Uniface provides a logical widget called Tab, which is mapped to utab. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
